hypothesis: When trained on OMat24+MPtrj+sAlex without MOF data, a universal MLIP augmented with environment-dependent atomic charges and an explicit Ewald-summed Coulomb term will achieve at least 2× lower mean absolute error than an otherwise identical charge-agnostic model in predicting zero-coverage CO2 adsorption enthalpies at 300 K for a held-out set of 50 MOFs with coordinatively unsaturated metal sites.
